mapper.sql: id, name, price, category, description, available, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_item (name, price, category, description, available) VALUES (#{name}, #{price}, #{category}, #{description}, #{available})
mapper.update: UPDATE menu_item SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, available = #{available} WHERE id = #{id}
